name: search
description: Manage search — search models, collections, and docs (beta). Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of model results to return (1-50, defaults to 20)

collections.description: Models for editing and manipulating images
collections.name: Image Editing

metadata.generated_description: Generate and edit images from text prompts and one or more input images. Combine multiple references via multi-image fusion to insert objects into new scenes, restyle environments, or blend visual styles. Apply natural-language edits such as object removal, background blur, pose changes, colorization, and style transfer, while maintaining character, object, and style consistency across a series. Support conversational, iterative workflows that follow multi-step instructions. Embed invisible SynthID watermarking for provenance on all generated or edited images.

model.description: Google's latest image editing model in Gemini 2.5
model.name: nano-banana
